steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The goal asks for an “example,” which demands naming a specific particle physicist, not discussing the field generally.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: B is the only choice that names a specific particle physicist (Samoil M. Bilenky) and connects him to neutrino research, fulfilling the goal. The other three don't name a specific physicist—they discuss ideas and practices generally. That matches choice B — B is correct.
